description:
## Background

`bsm-kia.13` requires a final contract step once every consumer
has migrated. Until the local copies are deleted, dead code
lingers and the duplicated surface remains available for future
specs to copy from. This sub-issue removes the old form and proves
its absence with a `rg` acceptance check.

## What to build

Final delete-and-verify pass: prove that no spec redeclares the
RPC interfaces, `executeAsync` lambdas, or DOM helpers. The
canonical implementation in `e2e/issue-list/helpers/rpc.ts` is
the only source.

## Technical Approach

- Confirm every migrate sub-issue (`bsm-kia.13.2`,
  `bsm-kia.13.3`, `bsm-kia.13.4`, `bsm-kia.13.5`) has landed.
- Run
  `rg "interface WorkspaceSwitchResponse|interface WorkspaceStateResponse|invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch|invokeWorkspaceState|issueRowSelector|expectIssueVisible" e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts`
  and confirm zero hits. If any hits remain, do not delete; either
  roll back the relevant migrate sub-issue or open a follow-up.
- If `helpers/rpc.ts` exports a temporary compatibility shim (e.g.,
  re-export from the old location for one migrate batch), delete
  it.
- Update `docs/agents/webdriver-e2e.md` if it references the old
  per-spec helpers by name.

## Considerations

- This sub-issue is intentionally tiny: it must be a single
  deletion + verification commit, not a refactor.
- If the contract step requires a non-trivial cleanup (e.g., a
  rename or signature change), split it further rather than
  blending with the contract.
- Don't delete the helper module's symbols — only the old local
  copies.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `rg "interface WorkspaceSwitchResponse|interface WorkspaceStateResponse|invokeTypedWorkspaceSwitch|invokeWorkspaceState|issueRowSelector|expectIssueVisible" e2e/issue-list/*.spec.ts`
      returns zero hits.
- [ ] No spec file imports the affected symbols from a path other
      than `helpers/rpc.ts`.
- [ ] `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and
      `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` pass.
- [ ] No dead exports remain in any spec or fixture file.

## Test Plan

- Run `pnpm exec ultracite check`, `pnpm test`, and
  `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` — all must pass.
- Run `pnpm e2e:issue-list:complete` and
  `pnpm e2e:issue-list:isolation` to prove no behavioral
  regression.
- Inspect the final diff: every spec file's symbol declarations
  for the migrated surfaces are gone, and the only declarations of
  those symbols live in `helpers/rpc.ts`.
title: Contract: delete local RPC + DOM helper copies from specs
